description_long: This is a rectangular barbecue grill with a robust, dark metal body and a hinged lid that can be opened or closed. The grill features a spacious cooking grate with a visible pattern, and beneath it, glowing coals or simulated flames suggest it is designed for charcoal grilling. The structure includes a wooden side shelf for food preparation or utensil placement, and a matching wooden lower shelf for storage. The grill stands on four sturdy metal legs, providing stability and elevating the cooking surface to a comfortable height. The exterior shows some weathering and rust spots, giving it a realistic, well-used appearance. There are no visible wheels, making it a stationary unit best suited for backyards, parks, or patios.
description: A rectangular, metal barbecue grill with a hinged lid, wooden side and lower shelves, and a spacious cooking grate over glowing coals. The grill has a weathered, realistic finish and stands on four sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, cooking grate with glowing coals, and both the wooden side and lower shelves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the grill, the open lid, and the full length of the wooden side shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid closed, showing the solid metal back and the lower wooden shelf, with no access to the cooking area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the open lid, interior grate, and the wooden side shelf.
